purpose: Price-led content with discount or bundle. Arabic text composed into image.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: {offer_type} promotional poster, {product_descriptor} prominently displayed, {discount_value} discount badge in {brand_color_primary}, urgent {urgency_level} typography in Arabic and English, {sector_visual_style}, professional design quality {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest, defend. Source code in research corpus: U02. Saudi adaptation guidance: Arabic typography Cairo font, right-to-left correct, discount in Arabic numerals or Hindi-Arabic based on brand. Saudi promotional periods: White Friday, National Day, Ramadan offers. Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per week.
